title: Non-Shadow The World (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces STW skin2 with The World's default skin (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces STW skin2 with The World's default skin

Because the regular STW skins don't resemble The World enough.

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
